message:
feat(widgets): add mouse event handling to Tree + refinements to List/Table

Tree widget mouse support (tree.rs):
- Add Tree::handle_mouse() and TreeState::handle_mouse() for click-to-select,
  click-to-toggle-expand on parent nodes, and scroll wheel navigation
- Add TreeState::scroll_up/scroll_down, select_next/select_previous helpers
- Parent nodes toggle expanded state on click; leaf nodes get selected
- 279 lines of mouse handling + 15 tests covering click, scroll, expand/collapse

List/Table refinements:
- list.rs: minor signature alignment with mouse module
- table.rs: add HoverChanged variant handling for mouse-move events

Also add mega_showcase_e2e.rs test file and update snapshots for
intrinsic sizing and markdown rich text screens.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
